api/ess/cors.php: CORS handler - strict HTTPS whitelist (join.rcsfacility.com, sid.rcsfacility.com)
api/ess/config.php: ESS config - DB connection, JWT, auth helpers (validateApiKey, requireAuth)
api/ess/helpers.php: Shared utilities - jsonOutput, getInput, safeBindParam, verifyPin, hashPin, determineEssRole, pagination
api/ess/login.php: ESS login - DB-backed rate limiting, bcrypt PIN verification, JWT token generation
api/ess/pin.php: PIN change - verify current PIN (bcrypt+birth-year fallback), set new PIN (bcrypt)
api/ess/sync.php: Sync employees to cache (GET=bulk, POST=single/batch), does NOT touch PIN column
api/ess/auth-reference.php: Reference auth implementation (PDO-based, not used in production)
php_payroll/index.php: Admin panel entry point - router, security headers, session init
php_payroll/includes/class.auth.php: Auth class - login/logout, session, DB rate limiting, role hierarchy
php_payroll/templates/header.php: Admin HTML template - Bootstrap 5, CDN links
database/migrations/001_status_enum_and_: DB migration for status enum and app_role
